arts.ttl: Premier League offer VAR explanations after TWO disallowed goals in Chelsea vs Tottenham
arts.sum: Chelsea midfielder Moises Caicedo saw a textbook volley from the edge of the box ruled out in Thursday night's big match against Tottenham after a lengthy VAR check

arts.ttl: Cristian Romero and Trevoh Chalobah ignite Chelsea vs Tottenham brawl after Levi Colwill moment
arts.sum: The Tottenham defender appeared to take a swipe at the ball and Colwill fell to the ground. A mass brawl broke out just moments before half-time in Chelsea's clash against Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: Dimitar Berbatov tells Tottenham one key ingredient they must use to fulfil Europa League dream
arts.sum: Any chance of ensuring European football returns to the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium next season rely on their success in the Europa League, with them currently in the quarter-final. Spurs currently sit 14th in the Premier League with nine games left to play .

arts.ttl: Chelsea's Jadon Sancho plan exposed as Man United outcome predicted
arts.sum: Former Manchester United shot-stopper Ben Foster has questioned Chelsea's commitment to making Jadon Sancho's move to Stamford Bridge a permanent one. Ex-United 'keeper Foster, who served at Old Trafford from 2005 to 2010, suspects Chelsea will opt for the smaller fee and steer clear of a player who hasn't had the most successful season at Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: “I’m very happy” – Blow for Tottenham as key summer target suggests he does not want to join Spurs
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur’s hopes of securing Johnny Cardoso this summer have hit a significant obstacle, as the American midfielder has made it clear he is in no rush to leave Spain. arts.ttl: Chelsea vs. Spurs team news: Starting lineups confirmed with Cole Palmer, Nicolas Jackson decisions made by Enzo Maresca
arts.sum: Chelsea and Tottenham Hotspur confirm their starting lineups for Thursday's Premier League game at Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: The three Chelsea stars who are doing exactly what Enzo Maresca wants Jadon Sancho to do - opinion
arts.sum: He could learn a thing or two from them.

arts.ttl: What next for João Félix? €196m man unwanted by Chelsea and AC Milan
arts.sum: João Félix was the most coveted young talent in the world when he emerged at Benfica but he’s never truly delivered on his undeniable talent. Several European giants...

arts.ttl: Premier League yet to rule on Chelsea women's team 'fair market value' sale
arts.sum: The Premier League will consider Chelsea's multimillion pound transaction to sell the women's team to a sister company.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca has previously had success with Reece James Chelsea plan
arts.sum: Maresca has since explained the thinking behind the midfield role for James, explaining how it will help protect him from injury. But I said already many times, Reece with us is playing right full-back, left full-back, midfielder - different positions.
